CVE-2021-3575.title: A heap-based buffer overflow was found in openjpeg in color.c:379 ...
CVE-2021-3575.description: A heap-based buffer overflow was found in openjpeg in color.c:379:42 in sycc420_to_rgb when decompressing a crafted .j2k file. An attacker could use this to execute arbitrary code with the permissions of the application compiled against openjpeg.
CVE-2021-3575.notes: The installed version of openjpeg2 has the fix for this vulnerability.

CVE-2023-39327.title: A flaw was found in OpenJPEG. Maliciously constructed pictures ca ...
CVE-2023-39327.description: A flaw was found in OpenJPEG. Maliciously constructed pictures can cause the program to enter a large loop and continuously print warning messages on the terminal.

CVE-2023-39329.title: A flaw was found in OpenJPEG. A resource exhaustion can occur in  ...
CVE-2023-39329.description: A flaw was found in OpenJPEG. A resource exhaustion can occur in the opj_t1_decode_cblks function in tcd.c through a crafted image file, causing a denial of service.

CVE-2023-39328.title: A vulnerability was found in OpenJPEG similar to CVE-2019-6988. T ...
CVE-2023-39328.description: A vulnerability was found in OpenJPEG similar to CVE-2019-6988. This flaw allows an attacker to bypass existing protections and cause an application crash through a maliciously crafted file.
CVE-2023-39328.notes: The installed version of openjpeg2 has the fix for this vulnerability.

CVE-2025-50952.title: openjpeg v 2.5.0 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer derefer ...
CVE-2025-50952.description: openjpeg v 2.5.0 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer dereference via the component /openjp2/dwt.c.

CVE-2024-56826.title: A flaw was found in the OpenJPEG project. A heap buffer overflow  ...
CVE-2024-56826.description: A flaw was found in the OpenJPEG project. A heap buffer overflow condition may be triggered when certain options are specified while using the opj_decompress utility.  This can lead to an application crash or other undefined behavior.

CVE-2024-56827.title: A flaw was found in the OpenJPEG project. A heap buffer overflow  ...
CVE-2024-56827.description: A flaw was found in the OpenJPEG project. A heap buffer overflow condition may be triggered when certain options are specified while using the opj_decompress utility.  This can lead to an application crash or other undefined behavior.

CVE-2019-6988.title: An issue was discovered in OpenJPEG 2.3.0. It allows remote attac ...
CVE-2019-6988.description: An issue was discovered in OpenJPEG 2.3.0. It allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (attempted excessive memory allocation) in opj_calloc in openjp2/opj_malloc.c, when called from opj_tcd_init_tile in openjp2/tcd.c, as demonstrated by the 64-bit opj_decompress.
CVE-2019-6988.notes: The installed version of openjpeg2 has the fix for this vulnerability.

CVE-2025-54874.title: OpenJPEG is an open-source JPEG 2000 codec. In OpenJPEG from 2.5. ...
CVE-2025-54874.description: OpenJPEG is an open-source JPEG 2000 codec. In OpenJPEG from 2.5.1 through 2.5.3, a call to opj_jp2_read_header may lead to OOB heap memory write when the data stream p_stream is too short and p_image is not initialized.
